title: Messy Bun & Getting Stuff Done Desk Mat | Cozy Cat Illustration, Laptop Mousepad | 16"x32" Inches | Customizable
description:
Warm, cozy, and quietly productive — this desk mat turns your workspace into a small sanctuary. A soft, fuzzy bun lounges beside a steaming mug on a muted, autumn-toned backdrop, with the gentle reminder: "Messy Bun & Getting Stuff Done." The neoprene surface cushions wrists and pens, while the anti-slip backing keeps everything steady through late-night write sessions, sketching sprees, or focused laptop work. Hemmed edges hold up to daily use, and the vivid print keeps its colors bright so the scene stays inspiring day after day. It’s the kind of piece that makes your desk feel cared for and invites you to settle in and finish what matters.

Product features
- Non-slip neoprene backing prevents sliding
- Multifunctional surface for typing, writing, or crafting
- Vibrant, long-lasting print with bright, crisp colors
- Durable hemmed edges resist fraying
- Available in three sizes to fit different desks
- 16"x32" Inches
- Customizable

Care instructions
- Use warm water and dish soap to clean spots off your pad. It's not necessary to soak the whole pad. For hard-to-clean spots use a soft-bristled brush.

title: Japanese Samurai Gaming Desk Mat | RGB Colored Mouse Pad
description:
Spread across your workspace like a burst of lightning and tide, this neoprene desk mat brings color, texture, and calm focus to long hours at the desk. The surface is printed in vivid, high-definition inks so swirling teal, magenta, gold, and violet hold their depth through typing, sketching, or gaming. A grippy, anti-slip backing keeps the mat exactly where you place it, while hemmed edges resist fraying so the art stays crisp over time. It’s roomy enough to anchor a keyboard and mouse or serve as a soft base for drawing and crafting — a functional canvas that lifts the mood of work, play, and late-night creativity.

Product features
- Durable 100% neoprene construction
- Non-slip/anti-slip rubber backing for steady placement
- Vivid, high-definition color printing
- Reinforced hemmed edges to prevent fraying
- Available in three sizes for different desk setups

Care instructions
- Use warm water and dish soap to clean spots off your pad. It's not necessary to soak the whole pad. For hard-to-clean spots use a soft-bristled brush.
